_description: AH-gate Stage 1 known counter deltas. The new counter gate (gate=counters) compares per-stage architectural-invariant counts (dpe_fire_count, pass_count, row_count, lane_count, softmax_exp_fires, softmax_norm_fires) — Fmax-independent integers describing the same hardware. A delta entry here documents a real disagreement with file:line root-cause citations; the gate accepts the residual if |delta - delta_count| <= tolerance.

_schema.key: dpe_fire_count | pass_count | row_count | lane_count | softmax_exp_fires | softmax_norm_fires
_schema.delta_count: RTL - sim (negative = RTL fires fewer times than sim expects; positive = RTL fires more)
_schema.tolerance: allowed wiggle around delta_count (typically 0 — counter equality is integer)
_schema.root_cause: file:line citation of the structural or modelling source of the residual

_status_2026_04_25: STAGE 1 + Bug-1 + Bug-2 fixes applied. Bug 1 (head FSM single-fire instead of N×N attention) is FIXED via outer Q-row loop with DIMM soft-rst between iterations (head FSM now iterates q_row_idx ∈ [0..N-1] in fc_verification/rtl/{nldpe,azurelily}_attn_head_d64_c128.v). Bug 2 (NL-DPE sm_exp / ws_log instantiated without #(.KERNEL_WIDTH(1), .NUM_COLS(1)) defparams → DPE stub default KW=128 needs 26 strobes vs FSM's 8 → DPE never reaches reg_full → never fires under iverilog) is FIXED via _gen_dimm_stage emitting #(.KERNEL_WIDTH(1), .NUM_COLS(1)) on KW=1/NUM_COLS=1 instances (nl_dpe/gen_attention_wrapper.py). softmax_exp fire count went 0 → 2048 (16 lanes × 128 rows) confirming sm_exp now fires; mac_sv added +2048 from ws_log now firing (8192 → 10240). All Bug-1- and Bug-2-attributed structural-zero deltas have COLLAPSED. Remaining residuals are exclusively from Bug 3 (NL-DPE lane-vs-row counter granularity; AL n_parallel_outputs=N×N counter granularity) and Bug 4 (AL linear_qkv unit mismatch run_gemm vs gemm_dsp). Those deltas are intentionally NOT pre-registered here so the gate exit code surfaces them for the next bug-fix iteration.

_post_bug_1_collapsed_deltas._note: Diagnostic: deltas that the Bug-1 fix eliminated. These entries are kept here only as a record; the gate does not consult this dict.

mac_sv.dpe_fire_count.post_fix: +4096 (Bug 2 ws_log + Bug 3 K_id; UPDATED post-Bug-2: now +6144 with ws_log firing, all Bug 3 lane×K_id)

_post_bug_2_collapsed_deltas._note: Diagnostic: deltas that the Bug-2 fix eliminated. NL-DPE only — AL was unaffected since Bug 2 was a NL-DPE generator-side issue.

softmax_exp.softmax_exp_fires.post_fix: +1920 (sm_exp now fires, residual is Bug 3 lane-vs-row 16× over-count)

mac_sv.dpe_fire_count.post_fix: +6144 (ws_log added 2048 fires; +4096 unchanged from ws_exp Bug 3, +2048 new from ws_log lane-vs-row)

deltas.root_cause: Bug 4 (NOT addressed by Bug-1 fix). Unit mismatch between sim and RTL. Sim's _run_linear for AL uses imc_core.run_gemm (NOT gemm_dsp), which counts 'IMC tile fires' = M × total_imc = 128 × 1 = 128 fires per arm. RTL has 64 dsp_macs per arm in parallel-output mode, each firing once per row → 64 dsp_mac fires per row × 128 rows × 3 arms = 24,576 RTL fires. Sim counts 128 × 3 = 384. Δ = +24,192. Classification: structural_sim_modeling. To fix, _run_linear should branch on cfg.imc=='Azure-Lily' to use gemm_dsp with n_parallel_outputs=N just like _run_dimm does. This entry is preserved across the Bug-1 fix because the linear_qkv stage is upstream of the head's outer-loop refactor and was unaffected by the Bug-1 fix.
